events: Gongja wakes from Manseng and speaks with student Ja Soo-jung
Ja Soo-jung asks if Gongja achieved his goal through death
Gongja realizes Ja Soo-jung's essence is to worry and protect all people
Gongja summons the Earth Bone Dragon's Skull skill card
Gongja offers bodies to creatures in the Ghost Warehouse
Mirror creature accepts and is resurrected with a cockroach-like body
Meow the puppy doll and other creatures are given bodies
Gongja uses Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation to summon Preta
Gongja tells Preta to live and that he will carry her when she falls
cause_effect: Gongja meeting the Tower Master -> learned her human side and protective essence
Gongja using Earth Bone Dragon's Skull -> gives immortal bodies to Ghost Warehouse creatures
Clearing creatures from Ghost Warehouse -> reduces Tower Master's burden
Reducing Tower Master's burden -> path to defeating her
chapters.notes: Ja Soo-jung as a middle school student represents God's pure desire to protect everyone. Meow is a puppy doll that meows and believes the world will end if it stops contemplating existence. Gongja's primary goal was to meet the Tower Master as a human.

events: Gongja compresses Preta into the Earth Bone Dragon's Box bead
Gongja asks Preta to be his daughter and gives her the choice to accept a body
Preta's bead nods in agreement
Gongja swallows the bead and shadows wrap around his heart
Gongja uses Earth Bone Dragon's Skull to recreate Preta's body as Estelle
Estelle manifests her power and splits the rain, clouds, and sunset with her sword
499 members of the Demonic Cult are resurrected
Gongja addresses the four leaders of the cult individually
Demonic Cult declares loyalty and intent to conquer the Tower
Immortal Demonic Cult Army is completed
cause_effect: Gongja offering Preta a choice -> Preta accepts and is reborn as Estelle
Estelle's rebirth -> manifests as Devil King of Fall Rain, splits the sky with her sword
499 Demonic Cult members resurrected -> regain their prime martial arts and bodies
Resurrected cult + Estelle -> formation of the Immortal Demonic Cult Army
chapters.notes: Estelle chooses her new name to honor the first person she killed, deciding to live a life to replace that person. She is assigned to work at the Planetarium Cafe to learn what it means to be human. The chapter briefly switches to third person narration at the end.

events: 1000 total Demonic Cult members mentioned; 499 previously summoned, 500 awaiting
Cult members celebrate regaining their bodies and martial arts
Gongja summons Golden Silk (Sylvia Evanail)
Raviel's presence transforms the hanok into the Ivansia Duchy throne room
Gongja confronts Sylvia about being a regressor who aimed to be Empress
Sylvia confesses she admired and fell in love with Raviel
Sylvia reveals the Silver Bells secret social club dedicated to Raviel
Sylvia demonstrates that Raviel Ivansia and Sylvia Evanail share the exact same letters
Story of the butler praying to Hamustra to rewind time, erasing himself from existence
deaths: Butler (ceased to exist in restored timeline)
loops: Butler prayed to Hamustra/Corner Librarian -> time was rewound to before Sylvia became Empress and Raviel was ruined
cause_effect: Butler's prayer to Hamustra -> time rewound -> Raviel's heart protected but butler ceased to exist
Sylvia regressing with Constellation power -> attempted to seize Empress position from Raviel
Sylvia's admiration for Raviel -> creation of Silver Bells club -> discovered their names are anagrams
chapters.notes: The Hundred Ghost Penal Colony is formally introduced. Sylvia Evanail's name is an exact anagram of Raviel Ivansia when broken into consonants and vowels. The butler sacrificed his entire existence to save both Raviel and Sylvia through a timeline reversal. Total Demonic Cult army is 1000 strong.
